signals.title: Europese Commissie wil MiCA uitbreiden voor tokenisering en niet-EU stablecoin-emittenten
signals.summary: The European Commission is reportedly seeking comment from stakeholders on expanding MiCA rules until Sept. 30.

signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: Stablecoinmarkt krimpt met tien miljard dollar sinds mei
signals.summary: Stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May, but analyst sees no reason to panic

signals.title: Ethereum stijgt 3% op tokeniseringsgolf; $1.800 mogelijk onder druk
signals.summary: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

signals.title: Dollarcoin-stablecoins kunnen valutatoegang verbeteren maar valutacrises verergeren: IMF
signals.summary: An IMF working paper says dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.

signals.title: EU-ambtenaren overwegen wijzigingen MiCA voor niet-EU stablecoin-uitgevers
signals.summary: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

signals.title: Euro-stablecoins volgens MiCA groeiden 128% voor overgangstermijn
signals.summary: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

signals.title: Verenigd Koninkrijk verlaagt kapitaalbuffers voor stablecoins onder MiCA-niveau
signals.summary: UK to lower stablecoin capital buffers, undercutting EU's MiCA requirements
